nodes.name: Document Intake Webhook
nodes.notes: Entry point — receives bank statements, onboarding forms, loan applications

nodes.name: S3 Raw Landing Bucket
nodes.notes: Uploads raw document to S3 landing zone

nodes.name: SQS Queue
nodes.notes: Enqueues the S3 key for async processing

nodes.name: Lambda Orchestrator
nodes.notes: Parses SQS messages, prepares document context for agent pipeline

parameters.name: body

nodes.name: Classifier Agent — Document Type Detection
nodes.notes: Amazon Bedrock (Claude) classifies document type

nodes.name: Parse Classification Result
nodes.notes: Extracts document_type, confidence from LLM response

nodes.name: Extraction Agent — Textract
nodes.notes: AWS Textract: extracts text, tables, forms from document

nodes.name: Extraction Agent — Comprehend NER
nodes.notes: Amazon Comprehend: Named Entity Recognition (person, org, dates, amounts)

nodes.name: Validation Agent — Schema & Confidence Checks
nodes.notes: Validates extracted data against schema; flags low-confidence for HITL

nodes.name: Route: HITL or Proceed?
nodes.notes: Splits to HITL review queue or Routing Agent based on validation result

nodes.name: HITL Review Queue — Human in the Loop
nodes.notes: Low-confidence or invalid docs sent to human review dashboard

nodes.name: Wait for Human Approval
nodes.notes: Pauses execution; resumes when reviewer approves via webhook callback

nodes.name: Routing Agent — Destination Selection
nodes.notes: Determines which data zone and downstream systems receive the document

nodes.name: Bronze Zone — Raw Structured JSON
nodes.notes: S3 Bronze: raw extracted JSON, no transformation

nodes.name: Silver Zone — Cleansed & Deduplicated
nodes.notes: Normalises fields, removes duplicates via content hash

nodes.name: Gold Zone — Business Aggregates
nodes.notes: Derives business-level aggregates: entity summaries, risk indicators

parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO documents (
  correlation_id, document_type, confidence, entity_summary,
  risk_high_value, risk_multi_entity, processed_at, s3_silver_key
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.gold.correlation_id }}',
  '{{ $json.gold.document_type }}',
  {{ $json.silver.confidence }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.gold.entity_summary) }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.gold.risk_indicators.high_value }},
  {{ $json.gold.risk_indicators.multiple_entities }},
  '{{ $json.gold.aggregated_at }}'::timestamptz,
  '{{ $json.silver.correlation_id }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (correlation_id) DO UPDATE SET
  entity_summary = EXCLUDED.entity_summary,
  processed_at = EXCLUDED.processed_at;

nodes.name: Aurora RDS — Operational Store for Underwriters
nodes.notes: Upserts gold-tier document record for underwriter portal queries

nodes.name: Redshift Serverless — BI & Executive Queries
nodes.notes: Writes aggregated metrics to Redshift for QuickSight dashboards

nodes.name: ElasticSearch — Full-Text Document Search
nodes.notes: Full-text index for underwriter portal search and compliance retrieval

nodes.name: SageMaker Feature Store
nodes.notes: Writes ML features to SageMaker Feature Store for training and inference

nodes.name: Training Pipeline — Churn, Credit Risk, Recommendations
nodes.notes: Triggers SageMaker training job for churn, credit risk, and recommendation models. Schedule-driven (weekly or on data volume threshold).

nodes.name: Inference Endpoints — A/B Deployed
nodes.notes: Calls A/B deployed SageMaker inference endpoints for real-time predictions

nodes.name: QuickSight — Executive Dashboards
nodes.notes: Triggers QuickSight dataset refresh for executive BI dashboards

nodes.name: Underwriter Portal — React + API Gateway
nodes.notes: Notifies underwriter portal via API Gateway when a new document is ready for review

nodes.name: Personalisation Engine — Product Recommendations
nodes.notes: Sends ML inference results to personalisation engine for product recommendation delivery

nodes.name: Macie — PII Detection
nodes.notes: AWS Macie scans extracted text for PII; redacts or flags before storage

nodes.name: KMS — Field Encryption
nodes.notes: AWS KMS encrypts sensitive fields before they leave the processing pipeline

parameters.name: body

nodes.name: CloudTrail + GuardDuty Audit Log
nodes.notes: Writes audit event to CloudWatch Logs; CloudTrail + GuardDuty picks it up for compliance

nodes.name: Respond 202 Accepted
nodes.notes: Returns 202 Accepted immediately; async processing continues in background

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.notes: Catches pipeline errors, logs to CloudWatch, sends alert to ops channel

main.node: HITL Review Queue — Human in the Loop
Aurora RDS — Operational Store for Underwriters
Training Pipeline — Churn, Credit Risk, Recommendations
